title: hieracium substoloniferum
intro: Hieracium substoloniferum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium substoloniferum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Hieracium substoloniferum can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
